ERRORS.NETWORK: No connection. Check your network and try again.
ERRORS.SERVER: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.

HOME.LEDE: A GPS-based, real-world hide-and-seek game. Enter the playfield. Don't get caught.
HOME.UPLINK_FAILED_BODY: Command server unreachable. Your operative file could not be retrieved. Check your signal and re-enter the field.

PLAYFIELD_DETAIL.TITLE: PLAYFIELD
PLAYFIELD_DETAIL.ERROR_SAVE: FAILED TO SAVE PLAYFIELD — TRY AGAIN

PLAYFIELD_LIST.TITLE: PLAYFIELDS
PLAYFIELD_LIST.DELETE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This playfield will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
PLAYFIELD_LIST.PUBLIC_SEARCH_HINT: TYPE AT LEAST 3 CHARACTERS TO SEARCH.

PLAYFIELD_CREATE.TITLE: NEW PLAYFIELD
PLAYFIELD_CREATE.ERROR_CREATE: FAILED TO CREATE PLAYFIELD — TRY AGAIN

GAME_CREATE.TITLE: NEW OPERATION
GAME_CREATE.SUBTITLE: CONFIGURE MISSION PARAMETERS
GAME_CREATE.ERROR_CREATE: OPERATION FAILED — CHECK YOUR SIGNAL AND RETRY

GAME_LOBBY.TITLE: LOBBY
GAME_LOBBY.SUBTITLE: AWAITING OPERATIVES
GAME_LOBBY.ASSIGN_HINT: TAP AN OPERATIVE TO ASSIGN THEM AS HUNTER — EVERYONE ELSE BECOMES PREY
GAME_LOBBY.LOAD_ERROR: FAILED TO LOAD LOBBY — CHECK YOUR SIGNAL

GAME_JOIN.TITLE: ACCESS CODE
GAME_JOIN.SUBTITLE: ENTER THE 4-DIGIT CODE PROVIDED BY THE GAME HOST
GAME_JOIN.ERROR_WRONG_CODE: INVALID ACCESS CODE — CHECK THE CODE AND TRY AGAIN

GAME_SHARE.TITLE: Join me on The Prey!
GAME_SHARE.MESSAGE: You are invited to join a game on The Prey! Tap the link to join, then enter this code:

GAME_TRACKING.NOTIFICATION_BODY: Reporting your position to command. Tracking continues while the app is in the background.

GAME_PROGRESS.GPS_DENIED_MSG: Location permission is denied. Enable location access for The Prey to stay in the game.
GAME_PROGRESS.GPS_UNAVAILABLE_MSG: Can't get a GPS fix. Move to open sky and make sure location is switched on.
GAME_PROGRESS.REPORTING_DEGRADED_MSG: Can't reach command. Your position isn't being shared — check your connection.
